rationale: In the citing paper, Melumad et al. (2019) is cited once in the general discussion as background support for the claim that mobile-generated text tends to be briefer, more emotional, and gist-based. The PARA article does not use that paper to develop its core hypotheses, construct definitions, algorithm design, or validation approach. The citation serves as contextual prior evidence for a possible application setting rather than a meaningful building block of the main contribution.
